channel.title: Krishiv Blog
channel.description: Technical notes from the Krishiv engine — batch SQL, streaming pipelines, and incremental processing.

item.title: Introducing Krishiv: One Engine for Batch, Streaming, and Incremental Data Processing
item.dc:creator: KrishivAI
item.description: A codebase-grounded overview of the unified engine vision — why Krishiv exists, what it does today, and how it runs batch SQL, streaming, and incremental view maintenance under one Apache Arrow / DataFusion runtime.
